'''Base Delta-Nine''' was a secret [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] starfighter base operational [[4 ABY/Legends|six months after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Aggressor Wing]] were based at the facility for a short while.

==Behind the scenes==
Base Delta-Nine's location is marked as "classified" in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: In the Empire's Service]]''. However, the facility may be located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Recopia]], which was the staging area for the New Republic fleet prior to the [[Battle of Brentaal IV (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brentaal IV]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> an engagement that Rogue Squadron, Aggressor Wing and Admiral Ackbar all participated in. Both units and the admiral were known to have been at Delta-Nine two weeks prior to the liberation of Brentaal, making the facility's location on Recopia a distinct—if unconfirmed—possibility.

*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 21|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 21]] {{1st}}
